note: Sealed Capsule visual decrypt path (Fase Sealed-1.E). Web wallet dashboard grew a 'Decrypt Sealed Capsule' card: paste a 64-hex txid, the wallet fetches the transaction over RPC, walks every output's payload_hex, and tries to decrypt sealed envelopes (types 0x02 / 0x04 / 0x06) against the active wallet key. On success a green callout shows the type, template_id (for sealed structured), and the recovered plaintext (Sealed Note text, Structured fields, or Doc-Ref file_size + file_hash + locator). On failure a grey chip says 'Encrypted Capsule — not decryptable by this wallet'; if no wallet is unlocked, an amber message asks for unlock/import. Plaintext lives in DOM only — never localStorage, never sessionStorage, never console.log. lockWallet and endWalletSession wipe the rendered fragment. Explorer TX detail now shows a gold '🔒 Encrypted Capsule' chip + 'open in wallet' pointer for sealed capsules; explorer never has the recipient privkey. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO transaction wire format, NO node, NO miner. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
